steps.description: Click the "How can you help me?" dialog box within the vscuse_app_X1Cladev interface on Microsoft Teams at coordinates (558, 535) to activate or interact with its content.
Click the "Send" button in the Microsoft Teams chat interface to submit the message "How can you help me?".
Click the "Send a message" text box in Microsoft Teams to enable typing input.
Press 'Home' key to move the cursor to the beginning of the message input field in the Microsoft Teams web application chat interface.
@assertion there's response message form ai agent.
Click the "Close (X)" button located in the top-right corner of the Microsoft Teams chat application to close the window.
